name: SIYI Technology
notes: Chinese manufacturer. ZR10 (10x optical), ZR30 (30x optical), A8 series. Lightweight options.

name: Viewpro
notes: Chinese manufacturer. Multiple zoom gimbal models including Q10F, U30TIRM Pro (30x). Also OEM supplier.

name: Topotek
notes: Chinese manufacturer founded 2012. 10x-90x zoom cameras, multi-sensor gimbals. KHY10S90, KIP10S4K, SIP30S90.

name: DJI
notes: Chinese manufacturer. Zenmuse H20 (15x zoom, 678g), Zenmuse H30 (34x zoom, 920g). Enterprise payloads.

name: Foxtech
notes: Chinese manufacturer. EH26 (26x), EH30 (30x), SEEKER-30 (30x), SYK-30 AI (30x, 770g). Multiple product lines.

name: Gremsy
notes: Vietnamese manufacturer. Zio (20x optical/30x hybrid), Vio (20x optical), Orus L (25x). MAVLink compatible.

name: Yangda
notes: Chinese manufacturer. Sky Eye series (10x-40x zoom), Storm Eye series (30x-40x zoom). Wide product range.

name: Zingto
notes: Chinese manufacturer. INYYO series: Q12X (10x), Q350/Q353/Q355 (30x). 2K-4K EO with thermal options.

name: Ukrspecsystems
notes: Ukrainian manufacturer. USG-261 (10x, 400g), USG-231 (30x), USG-405 (30x + IR + LRF).

name: Trillium Engineering
notes: Canadian manufacturer. HD25 (12x, <400g), HD45 (20x, 885g), HD55, HD80 (72x). Military/defense focused.

name: Edge Autonomy (formerly Octopus ISR)
notes: US manufacturer. E95 (570g), E140LC, E140Z, E180. Up to 30x optical zoom. Military/defense.

name: Controp
notes: Israeli manufacturer. EO/IR gimbals for UAVs. Military/defense focused. Premium pricing.

name: CUAV
notes: Chinese manufacturer. Q10F (10x optical, 413g). Uses Viewpro OEM components.

name: Threod Systems
notes: Estonian manufacturer. Shark gimbal for small UAVs. Integrated with proprietary autopilot.

name: Sky-Drones
notes: UK-based. Offers payloads with 10x/20x/30x optical zoom. Integration platform.

name: Savgood Technology
notes: Chinese OEM. Zoom camera modules including UAV modules. B2B/OEM supplier.

name: Digital Eagle
notes: Chinese manufacturer. Tracking cameras for UAVs. Both drones and payloads.

name: Autel Robotics
notes: Chinese/US manufacturer. EVO Max 4T has 10x optical zoom. Primarily makes complete drones, gimbals not sold separately for third-party drones.

name: Mugin UAV
notes: Chinese manufacturer. Makes UAVs and carries third-party gimbals. May resell rather than manufacture.
